meta.homeTitle: Eduvisa — Your Future Starts Abroad | STUDY ABROAD
meta.homeDescription: The most trusted education consulting center in Uzbekistan. Admission, visa, and scholarship support for UK, USA, Canada, and Australia universities.
meta.homeOgDescription: Premium education consulting center. 1200+ students, 50+ countries, 95% acceptance rate.
meta.americaDescription: List of American universities available through the transfer program: 1 year in Malaysia + 3 years in the USA.

hero.subtitle: Uzbekistan's most trusted education consulting center. We'll guide you to the university of your choice — from consultation to visa.

transfer.titleHighlight: to any country in the world
transfer.subtitle: Get an international education with no entrance exams. The university itself prepares you and transfers you to the country of your choice.
transfer.year1Desc: Admission with no entrance exams. Strengthening English and academic foundations. Free IELTS & SAT prep.
transfer.chooseCountryDesc: After 1 year of study in Malaysia, with a score of at least IELTS 6 or 6.0+, you can transfer to the following universities.
transfer.americaCardDesc: The opportunity to transfer to top universities, earn an international diploma, and start your career in the USA.
benefits: No IELTS or SAT required in Malaysia, but at least IELTS 6 or higher is required to transfer to America
All majors available (IT, Business, Medicine, and more)
INTI University provides free IELTS & SAT prep
One of the world's top-500 universities
1 year in Malaysia + 3 years in America — full diploma

t1.quote: Thanks to the Eduvisa team, I found clear direction at a moment of doubt. Every detail was handled carefully in preparing my documents, and I was accepted to my dream university.

partners.title: Find us
partners.subtitle: Visit our office, conveniently located in the center of Tashkent.

q1.a: Yes, the first consultation is completely free. You'll get answers to all your questions with no obligation.

q2.q: How long does the process take?
q2.a: It usually takes 3-6 months — from submitting your university application to receiving your visa.

q3.q: Do I need an English certificate?
q3.a: Many universities require IELTS or TOEFL. Not for students applying through us.

q4.q: Is there a chance to get a scholarship?
q4.a: Absolutely. Our students win over $2M in scholarships every year.

q5.q: Which countries do you work with?
q5.a: UK, USA, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Ireland, and 30+ other countries.
